channel.title: morningNewsSection1
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from morningNewsSection1, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Inside President Trump's ongoing campaign to acquire Greenland
item.description: New Yorker writer Ben Taub reports that while the idea of acquiring Greenland has faded from headlines, it has not been abandoned. Taub details how Trump's ongoing efforts continue behind the scenes.

item.title: Taiwan says Chinese pressure over the island is the 'new normal'
item.description: Taiwan's Foreign Ministry stated on Tuesday that scholars had their passports and phones confiscated and were detained in Mombasa for over a day.

item.title: Pakistan removes 'luxury tax' on menstrual products and contraceptives. Will prices fall?
item.description: Taxes on menstrual products have long burdened consumers in Pakistan. A new budget eliminates the 18% sales tax. But questions remain about whether prices will actually drop.

item.title: Tropical Storm Arthur Becomes First Named Storm of Atlantic Hurricane Season
item.description: Forecasters warn Arthur may cause life-threatening flash floods along the northern Gulf Coast, but it is not expected to intensify.
